title: Asian stocks rise thanks to tech rebound and easing rate expectations
summary: Indices in Japan and South Korea post strong gains, driven by the recovery of technology stocks and hope for a pause in rate hikes.

title: European stocks rise and DAX hits new record as rate worries ease
summary: The Ibex surpasses 19,700 points, the DAX reaches 26,000 points, and European markets open higher on expectations that interest rates will not rise further.

title: Debate on the impact of artificial intelligence on the economy and markets
summary: Analysts and experts discuss whether AI will generate inflation, investment opportunities, or security risks, while OpenAI's founder proposes clear rules.

title: US jobs report disappoints with only 57,000 new jobs in June
summary: Job creation far below expectations fuels hopes of a pause in rate hikes and boosts global stock markets.

title: Oil falls on lower demand forecasts and Iran ceasefire
summary: Brent could drop to $60 per barrel, according to Citi, and crude confirms a bearish trend change.

title: Lagarde does not rule out leaving the ECB before her term ends
summary: ECB President Christine Lagarde opens the door to an early departure, raising uncertainty about the future of monetary policy.

title: SpaceX joins the Nasdaq 100 and its valuation sees sharp swings
summary: Elon Musk's space company enters the Nasdaq 100 index with a valuation that has swung between $150 and $225 in two weeks.

title: Warning signs in the stock market: earnings forecasts fuel bubble fears
summary: Experts warn that profit expectations are too optimistic and that the market may be overvalued.

title: Wall Street mixed with Dow Jones hitting a new record
summary: The Dow Jones marks an all-time high while the Nasdaq and S&P 500 trade unevenly.

title: Interest rates in Europe rise: Euribor and German bond yield up
summary: Euribor breaks its downtrend and the German 10-year bond yield rises to 2.9%.

title: Repsol: stock drop and dividend outlook
summary: Repsol is among the worst performers on the Ibex, as analysts review the oil company's dividend strategy.

title: Bitcoin rises and digital euro sparks controversy
summary: Bitcoin gains 2.33% as the digital euro project advances, sparking intense debate.

title: China faces new tech and financial regulations
summary: Alibaba bans employees from using an AI coding tool, while the SEC investigates alleged insider trading related to Chinese brokerages.

title: Tesla beats delivery expectations and leads electric vehicle debate
summary: Tesla delivers 480,126 vehicles in the second quarter, beating forecasts, as analysts compare major electric vehicle manufacturers.

title: Broadcom passes antitrust scrutiny in Japan and remains investor focus
summary: Japan's Fair Trade Commission closes its antitrust investigation into Broadcom, as investors debate its valuation.

title: Lockheed Martin leads purchase of Ultra Maritime and Voyager emerges as space and defense company
summary: Lockheed Martin is in advanced talks to acquire Ultra Maritime for $3.5 billion, while Voyager gains attention as a space defense firm.

title: Fast food chains: Jersey Mike's goes public and Wendy's attracts with its dividend
summary: Jersey Mike's files for its IPO as Blackstone seeks gains, and Wendy's offers a 6% dividend yield with a new CEO.

title: Canada announces new pipeline to reduce its dependence on the US
summary: Canada reveals plans to build a pipeline to export oil to other markets and reduce reliance on US refineries.

title: KNDS postpones its IPO in a setback for the German government
summary: Tank maker KNDS cancels its planned initial public offering for 2026, dealing a blow to the government's privatization plans.

title: Securitize, Spain's first unicorn, debuts on Wall Street with an 11% rise
summary: Securitize, the asset tokenization platform, starts trading on the Nasdaq and gains 11% on its first day.
